nasb.text: His arrows surround me. Without mercy He splits my kidneys open; He pours out my gall on the ground.

esv.text: his archers surround me. He slashes open my kidneys and does not spare; he pours out my gall on the ground.

cnv.text: 他的弓箭手四面包圍我， 他剖開我的腰子，全不顧惜， 把我的膽傾倒在地上。

ccb.text: 祂的弓箭手四面围住我， 祂毫不留情地刺透我的肾脏， 使我肝胆涂地。
